meta.title: Business launch simulator
login.title: Business launch simulator
login.tagline: Idea → first customer, one mission at a time.
dashboard.bippiWelcomeText: I'm your virtual assistant here — ready to answer any question about your launch and missions. Open the AI section whenever you want to ask.
dashboard.xpLine: {{xp}} total XP · {{pct}}% of SaaS track complete
dashboard.missionHint: One mission active at a time. Answer every question, complete the level to earn XP and unlock the next step.
dashboard.allDone: You finished every mission on this track.
dashboard.useAi: Use the AI assistant to plan your next move.
mission.locked: This mission is locked. Complete the previous mission first.
mission.completed: Completed — XP added to your total.
mission.tapHint: Tap a row to complete or undo a task. When all are checked, the mission completes automatically.
mission.questionsHint: Answer each question — then you can complete the level.
mission.fillAllHint: Fill in every field to unlock the complete button.
mission.draftError: Could not save draft — check your connection
mission.bippiHelpBody: If you're stuck on wording — open the AI coach. You can sketch a question below and jump to chat with that text prefilled.
mission.bippiHelpQuestionPlaceholder: e.g. How do I narrow the audience for my SaaS?
ai.noConversations: No chats in this mode yet. Start a new one.
ai.selectOrCreate: Create a new chat or pick one from the list.
ai.needLogin: Sign in to use the AI coach.
ai.emptyHint: Ask for SaaS ideas, paste an offer to improve, or describe what you're building.
level.1.name: Idea
level.2.name: Validation
level.3.name: MVP
level.4.name: Launch
level.5.name: First Customer
mission.saas-idea-1.title: Sharpen your SaaS idea
mission.saas-idea-1.description: Turn a vague thought into a one-line product you could explain in 30 seconds.
mission.saas-idea-1.task.2: The result for the user in one phrase
mission.saas-validation-1.title: Validate the problem
mission.saas-validation-1.description: Confirm strangers care before you build.
mission.saas-validation-1.task.2: Summarize the main problem in 3 bullets
mission.saas-mvp-1.title: Define MVP scope
mission.saas-mvp-1.description: Ship the smallest thing that proves value.
mission.saas-mvp-1.task.1: Pick one core user flow to implement first
mission.saas-mvp-1.task.2: Set a ship date within 14 days
mission.saas-launch-1.title: Prepare launch
mission.saas-launch-1.description: Make it easy for the right people to try you.
mission.saas-launch-1.task.1: Set up a waitlist or signup
mission.saas-launch-1.task.2: Post once where your ICP hangs out
mission.saas-customer-1.title: Land your first customer
mission.saas-customer-1.description: Revenue or a firm pilot counts.
mission.saas-customer-1.task.0: Run 5 short calls or DMs with qualified leads
mission.saas-customer-1.task.2: Close one paying user or signed pilot
